## How it works

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (or N/A — explain below)
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm test` pass locally
- [ ] No new paid mechanics, paywalls, or `StoreKit`/payment SDK imports
- [ ] If iOS UI changed: tested in simulator and accessibility labels are present
- [ ] If profile fields / location / messages / moderation touched: privacy + safety review requested

## Algorithm change?

<!-- Only fill in if this PR modifies anything under matching/ or algorithm_config.json. -->

- [ ] Updated `docs/algorithm/CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Bumped `algorithmVersion` and/or `rankingConfigVersion` per `docs/algorithm/versioning.md`
- [ ] Fairness analysis on synthetic fixtures
- [ ] Abuse-exploitation analysis
